nodes.label: AI as research starting point
nodes.label_negative: Prolonged manual research with rabbit holes
nodes.grounding_span: now AI can do that research in seconds for me and just give me the relevant information without going down rabbit holes of research

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: At the moment it's more collaborative, I use AI to assist me with a task rather than delegate to it

nodes.label: AI as assistant for complex work
nodes.label_negative: Manual handling of customer communications and paperwork
nodes.grounding_span: I still handle all my own communications with customers, orders, accounts etc. More out of habit than anything I suppose

nodes.label: Hands-on repair work as personal joy and pride
nodes.label_negative: AI taking over physical repair tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I still take a huge amount of joy and pride in fixing things

nodes.label: AI adoption in workplace
nodes.grounding_span: most people still think of AI from a year or two ago and that it hasn't improved since

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: save me a lot of time I can either enjoy or use to accomplish more

nodes.label: Personal accomplishment and satisfaction
nodes.grounding_span: I still take a huge amount of joy and pride in fixing things

nodes.label: Human usefulness and purpose
nodes.grounding_span: a huge part of being human is the desire to be useful and to achieve things

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: now AI can do that research in seconds for me and just give me the relevant information

nodes.label: Preference for collaborative AI use
nodes.grounding_span: At the moment it's more collaborative, I use AI to assist me with a task

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: when the time comes I'll move that area of the business over to AI too

nodes.label: Concern about AI replacing jobs
nodes.grounding_span: I'm aware that time is coming and I'm not looking forward to it

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI adoption
nodes.grounding_span: I encourage them to make use of AI whenever possible

nodes.label: Iterative back-and-forth questioning
nodes.grounding_span: a series of questions explaining the issue with the bike and collaborating on a likely avenue of investigation

nodes.label: Pragmatic acceptance of progress
nodes.grounding_span: I don't begrudge progress, I just hope I'm still useful when the time comes
